github._description: GitHub repo search, diff, file contents — for code-expert

qdrant._description: Vector DB access for all analysis agents

jupyter._description: Real Jupyter kernel execution — ML Jupyter MCP (ClaudeJupy)

code-context._description: Semantic code search via Zilliz — for code-expert

knowledge-rag._description: Web crawl + RAG for domain docs — manufacturing standards, curricula

filesystem._description: Local file system access for notebook analysis

_notes.activation: MCP servers are activated per-agent. Each agent's prompt specifies which MCPs to use.
_notes.qdrant_setup: Run scripts/setup_rag.sh before indexing. Then: python scripts/index_repo.py --repo <path> --collection <name>
_notes.jupyter_mcp: Requires Jupyter running: jupyter notebook --no-browser. Then set JUPYTER_TOKEN env var.
env_vars: GITHUB_TOKEN — GitHub Personal Access Token (for github MCP)
JUPYTER_TOKEN — Jupyter server token (for jupyter MCP)
ZILLIZ_CLOUD_URI — Zilliz URI (optional, for code-context MCP)
